step_rationale: MI susceptibility locus; proteasomal function; off-pathway generic protein turnover marker.
mechanism: PSMA6 is a MI susceptibility locus, plausibly linked to proteasomal regulation of inflammatory or cell-cycle signaling.

references.title: Molecular genetics of coronary artery disease.
[Genetic background of acute coronary syndrome].
references.journal: Nihon rinsho. Japanese journal of clinical medicine
